sleep.ingredients: Maltitol, water, pectin, carrageenans, citric acid, sodium citrate, sucralose, melatonin, L-theanine, passionflower extract, GABA, magnesium citrate, vitamin B6, valerian extract, natural flavour.
sleep.story: As the day winds down, NUKU SLEEP helps create a space of calm. Melatonin combined with valerian guides the mind toward sleep. The simple gesture for a soothing evening ritual.
sleep.usage_instructions:
• Take 2 gummies per day.
• To be consumed in the evening, shortly before bedtime.
• Ideal as part of a regular evening ritual.
• Suitable for daily use.
• Do not exceed the recommended daily dose.
• Not recommended for pregnant or breastfeeding women unless advised by a doctor.
• If under medical treatment or a specific condition, consult a healthcare professional.
• Food supplements should not replace a varied and balanced diet or a healthy lifestyle.
• Keep out of reach of children.
• Store in a cool and dry place.
• Close carefully after opening.
sleep.routineSubtitle: Sleep better with a calming routine
sleep.routineIntro: NUKU SLEEP supports sleep when integrated into an evening routine adapted to real life.
sleep.routineSub: Taking one gummy isn't enough — context matters.
routineTips: Take the gummies as part of your evening routine, at the moment that suits you best.
Avoid taking them at the last moment in bed; take them during a transition moment (sofa, bathroom, bedtime preparation).
If you watch a screen in the evening, avoid overly stimulating content right after taking them.
Accept that falling asleep is not immediate: sleep comes progressively.
Understand that the formula works better over time, not like an 'off' switch.
sleep.routineNote: Regular habits and evening routines influence the experience more than seeking an instant effect.

myths.myth: Taking one gummy is enough to fall asleep immediately.
myths.reality: NUKU SLEEP supports the natural transition to sleep and fits into a regular evening routine, without instant effect.

myths.myth: Melatonin acts like a sleeping pill.
myths.reality: Melatonin is a hormone naturally produced by the body. It supports the sleep-wake rhythm without forcing sleep onset.

myths.myth: Sleep aids are reserved for people with serious disorders.
myths.reality: NUKU SLEEP is for those who want to improve their evening habits, calm their mind and create better conditions for falling asleep.

sleep.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about NUKU SLEEP

faqs.question: What is NUKU Sleep for?
faqs.answer: NUKU Sleep is a food supplement designed to support the evening routine and promote a state of relaxation before bedtime, as part of a balanced lifestyle.

faqs.question: Is it a sleeping pill or a medicine?
faqs.answer: No. NUKU Sleep is not a medicine. It does not replace medical follow-up and does not treat chronic sleep disorders.

faqs.question: How long does it take to feel the effects?
faqs.answer: Experiences vary depending on the person, their lifestyle and sleep habits. Some may notice support quickly, others after regular use.

faqs.question: Can it be taken every evening?
faqs.answer: Yes, within the recommended dose. In case of pregnancy, breastfeeding, illness or medication, consult a healthcare professional.

faqs.question: Can this product cause dependence?
faqs.answer: NUKU Sleep is a food supplement and is not intended to create dependence. It fits into a progressive and gentle wellness approach.

faqs.question: Should I also adopt a sleep routine?
faqs.answer: Yes. Good sleep hygiene (regular schedules, limited screens in the evening, quiet environment) enhances the value of a food supplement.

faqs.question: Who can use NUKU Sleep?
faqs.answer: The product is intended for adults. People with persistent sleep disorders should consult a healthcare professional.

faqs.question: Can NUKU Sleep be combined with other supplements?
faqs.answer: Yes in most cases, but be aware of ingredient overlaps and possible interactions with certain treatments.

faqs.question: How many gummies should be taken per day?
faqs.answer: The recommended serving is 2 gummies per day, not to be exceeded.

faqs.question: When should they be taken?
faqs.answer: It is recommended to take the 2 gummies in the evening, before bedtime, as part of a relaxation ritual.

shine.ingredients: Maltitol, water, lemon juice, pectin, carrageenans, citric acid, sodium citrate, sucralose, MSM, biotin, zinc, bamboo extract, vitamin D3, vitamin B6, rocket extract, natural flavour.
shine.story: Designed as a ritual, NUKU SHINE integrates naturally into daily life. A synergy of biotin, zinc and MSM to support hair beauty. To reveal its radiance and strength, effortlessly.
shine.usage_instructions:
• Take 2 gummies per day.
• Can be consumed at any time of the day.
• Easily fits into a daily beauty routine.
• Suitable for regular use.
• Do not exceed the recommended daily dose.
• Not recommended for pregnant or breastfeeding women unless advised by a doctor.
• If under medical treatment or a specific condition, consult a healthcare professional.
• Food supplements should not replace a varied and balanced diet or a healthy lifestyle.
• Keep out of reach of children.
• Store in a cool and dry place.
• Close carefully after opening.
shine.routineTitle: Optimise your beauty ritual — NUKU SHINE
shine.routineSubtitle: Beauty & internal support for stronger hair
shine.routineIntro: NUKU SHINE supports hair beauty when used regularly and over time. The formula works from within and does not replace external care.
shine.routineSub: Consistency and patience play a more important role than seeking quick results.
routineTips: Take the gummies daily as part of a course, to support the natural hair cycle.
Understand that the formula does not act directly on visible hair, but supports the internal mechanisms related to its quality and resistance.
Do not expect immediate change: the hair cycle is slow, effects are observed over time.
Combine the formula with a consistent hair care routine (gentle care, scalp respect).
Accept that results vary depending on the person, lifestyle and regularity.
shine.routineNote: Consistency and patience play a more important role than seeking quick results.

myths.myth: A hair supplement can restart regrowth on its own.
myths.reality: NUKU SHINE is not a regrowth solution. The formula supports natural hair growth by sustaining its internal balance, as part of a regular beauty routine.

myths.myth: Stronger hair means quick and visible results.
myths.reality: Hair strength is built over time. Thanks to actives like MSM, NUKU SHINE supports hair structure and resistance, with a progressive and realistic approach.

shine.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about NUKU SHINE

faqs.question: What does the SHINE formula actually do?
faqs.answer: SHINE is designed to support normal hair health through nutrients involved in its structure and natural cycle.

faqs.question: Does SHINE make hair grow back quickly?
faqs.answer: No. Hair growth follows a slow biological rhythm. SHINE cannot trigger immediate regrowth or correct loss linked to a condition or hormonal imbalance.

faqs.question: When can results reasonably be assessed?
faqs.answer: A first assessment is possible around 8 to 12 weeks, then within a 3 to 6 month course.

faqs.question: Who is SHINE for?
faqs.answer: SHINE may suit adults wishing to support their hair vitality, accompany periods of fatigue or strengthen their hair care routine.

faqs.question: How many gummies to take and for how long?
faqs.answer: 2 gummies per day. A 3 to 6 month course is generally recommended, without exceeding the daily dose.

faqs.question: Is SHINE suitable for both men and women?
faqs.answer: Yes, the biological mechanisms of hair are the same for both.

faqs.question: What else can I do besides SHINE to care for my hair?
faqs.answer: Varied diet, hydration, sleep, stress management and gentle hair care. Supplements always act as support.

source.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about NUKU SOURCE

faqs.question: What does the SOURCE formula actually do?
faqs.answer: SOURCE supports the body's natural elimination functions and digestive comfort through a selection of plants.

faqs.question: Does SOURCE 'detoxify' the body?
faqs.answer: No. The body already has its own regulatory systems. SOURCE supports them without replacing them.

faqs.question: When are effects felt?

faqs.question: Who is SOURCE for?

strength.routineTitle: How to use NUKU STRENGTH daily
strength.routineIntro: NUKU STRENGTH supports energy, performance and concentration over time. Creatine plays an essential role in energy availability, including at the brain level.
strength.routineSub: It's not the occasional intake that counts, but consistency day after day.
routineTips: Adapt intake to the day: more during intense effort, less on a regular day.
2 to 3 gummies suit most days, 4 during more demanding efforts.
Creatine works best when taken regularly.
STRENGTH fits into a sports or daily routine, without needing intensive sport.
Don't expect an immediate effect: efficacy builds over time.
strength.routineNote: Day-after-day consistency is the key to good energy functioning.

myths.reality: Creatine is naturally present in the body and useful daily, even outside sport.
It's not a miracle product. Effects are progressive and support repeated efforts.
It does not stimulate the nervous system. It supports cellular energy without nervousness.

myths.myth: Creatine has no link to concentration.
myths.reality: It plays a role in the body's overall energy and can support mental clarity.

strength.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about NUKU STRENGTH

soul.routineTitle: Optimise your daily balance — NUKU SOUL
soul.routineSubtitle: Inner calm · Stress adaptation · Emotional stability
soul.routineIntro: NUKU SOUL supports inner calm and emotional balance when used in the real rhythm of daily life. It's not about eliminating stress, but living through demanding days better.
soul.routineSub: Context, regularity and personal rhythm influence the experience more than seeking an instant effect.
routineTips: Take the gummies at an identifiable moment of the day, for example after work or when main obligations are done.
Avoid taking them in full rush (meetings, travel, constant notifications): the formula works better when integrated into a transition moment.
Don't expect an immediate effect: calm doesn't settle like a switch.
Understand that NUKU SOUL doesn't eliminate stress sources, but supports the ability to face them with more stability.
The formula is particularly appreciated when days are intense, to support the rhythm and help find a better balance.
soul.routineNote: Context, regularity and personal rhythm influence the experience more than seeking an instant effect.

myths.myth: Ashwagandha acts like a natural anxiolytic.
myths.reality: Ashwagandha is not an anxiolytic and does not replace medical treatment. It supports stress adaptation in a progressive and non-sedative approach.

myths.myth: If I don't feel an immediate effect, the formula doesn't work.
myths.reality: Plants like ashwagandha and saffron don't act through immediate sensation. Their role is to support balance progressively, without marked or artificial effect.

soul.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about NUKU SOUL

faqs.question: What does the SOUL formula actually do?
faqs.answer: SOUL is designed to support emotional balance and the body's ability to cope with daily stress through a combination of plants, amino acids and vitamins.

faqs.question: Does SOUL completely eliminate stress?
faqs.answer: No. SOUL helps the body better manage daily pressure, without eliminating stress sources or treating an anxiety disorder.

faqs.question: When can effects be assessed?
faqs.answer: Some people notice an evolution from the first intakes. A more complete assessment is made over several weeks, then in a 3 to 6 month course.

faqs.question: Who is SOUL for?
faqs.answer: SOUL may suit adults wishing to better manage daily pressure, support their mood and preserve their mental clarity.

faqs.question: How many gummies to take and for how long?
faqs.answer: The recommended dose is 2 gummies per day. A 3 to 6 month course can be considered, without exceeding the daily dose.

faqs.question: Does SOUL act on sleep?
faqs.answer: SOUL is not a sleep formula. However, by supporting stress management, it may indirectly promote relaxation.

faqs.question: What else can I do besides SOUL to better manage stress?
faqs.answer: Regular sleep, breathing/meditation, physical activity, balanced diet, hydration and breaks.
